summary: C5: Particle taxonomy and hover inspection. Particles now classified as CORE (inner gold, ~20%), MEMORY (mid blue-violet, ~40%), ACTIVITY (outer green, ~40%) via per-vertex shader attributes. Raycaster-based hover detection shows tooltip with type label, role description, shell depth, orbit radius, and phase weight for the hovered particle. Hovered particle visually pops: larger, white ring outline, nudged toward camera. Tooltip repositions to stay within viewport bounds. Dragging suppresses hover. Hint text updated.
achievements: Particle type taxonomy — 3 semantic roles stored as GPU vertex attributes
Per-type color: CORE=warm gold, MEMORY=cool blue-violet, ACTIVITY=muted green
Type-based base sizes — CORE largest (most prominent), ACTIVITY smallest
Shader blends type color toward white with confidence (high confidence = warmer overall)
Raycaster hover inspection — threshold 2.5 world units
CPU-side particleMeta array mirrors GPU buffer for metadata retrieval on hit
Tooltip: type, role, shell depth, radius, phase weight
Phase weight table: maps particle type × current phase → contribution weight
Hover visual feedback: uHoveredIdx uniform → vertex shader pops size + adds ring glow
Tooltip repositions to avoid viewport overflow
Drag state suppresses hover inspection correctly
open_threads: Click-to-lock a particle (keep tooltip open while camera orbits)
Particle search: hover particles near a specific shell or type
Memory ring visualization — particles near shell 1-2 pulse brighter when new pattern stored
XR mode: tooltip placement in 3D space when in VR
